description_long: This object consists of two stacked hardcover books, both bound together by a wide, dark brown strap that runs vertically across their covers and spines. The top book features a textured, teal-blue cover with a subtle diagonal pattern, while the bottom book has a more muted, olive-green cover. The spines of both books are visible, with the top book's spine adorned with gold decorative bands and the bottom book's spine appearing plain. The pages are thick and cream-colored, giving the books a substantial and classic appearance. The strap is made of a leather-like material and is fastened securely, suggesting the books are meant to be carried together. No visible illustrations or text are present on the covers.
description: Two stacked hardcover books, one teal-blue and one olive-green, bound together by a wide brown strap. The books have textured covers, gold spine accents, and thick cream pages.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cream-colored pages and the thickness of both books, with the brown strap visible across the top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the teal-blue cover, gold spine bands, and the brown strap running vertically down the center.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the page edges and the strap, with the greenish bottom book more visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back covers of both books and the central brown strap.
attribute_spine_design: The top book's spine is black with gold decorative bands, while the bottom book's spine is brown and plain. No text or additional ornamentation is visible.
